title: cxxrtl RFE: enhance cxxrtl_object with additional type flags
body:
Right now, cxxrtl_object only contains type (value, wire, memory), width, depth, and value.

The comments in the source already say: "More description fields will be added in the future, b...", but I want to make this more concrete: I'd like to see a flag that indicates that a wire is driven by a FF (IOW, an `is_ff_cell`), by a sync cell (`is_sync_ff_cell`), whether or not it's an internal port, what kind of port type etc. 

The immediate use case I'm thinking about is a poor man's version of Siloti, where you'd only dump the values of FFs to a waveform, and figure all the other combinational values by loading these values back into the FFs and executing a simulation `step()`.
